title: racosperma daweanum
intro: Racosperma daweanum, also known as the Daweana or Daweana pea tree, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Racosperma daweanum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Racosperma daweanum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes.
